scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:skills && npm run test:pi-deps
scripts.test:compute-guardrails: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/compute-guardrails.test.mjs'
scripts.test:context-kit: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/context-kit/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:learn: sh -c 'scripts=$([ -d exact_scripts ] && echo exact_scripts || echo scripts); set -- "$scripts"/learn-*.test.mjs; [ -e "$1" ] || { echo "No learn tests found" >&2; exit 1; }; node --test "$@"'
scripts.test:lsp: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/lsp/__tests__/lsp.test.mjs'
scripts.test:pi-deps: sh -c 'scripts=$([ -d exact_scripts ] && echo exact_scripts || echo scripts); node "$scripts"/validate-pi-deps.mjs'
scripts.test:prompts: sh -c 'scripts=$([ -d exact_scripts ] && echo exact_scripts || echo scripts); set -- "$scripts"/*-prompts.test.mjs; [ -e "$1" ] || { echo "No prompt tests found" >&2; exit 1; }; node --test "$@"'
scripts.test:skills: sh -c 'scripts=$([ -d exact_scripts ] && echo exact_scripts || echo scripts); node "$scripts"/validate-skills.mjs'
scripts.test:skills:profiles: sh -c 'scripts=$([ -d exact_scripts ] && echo exact_scripts || echo scripts); CHEZMOI_VALIDATE_PROFILE=work node "$scripts"/validate-skills.mjs && CHEZMOI_VALIDATE_PROFILE=personal node "$scripts"/validate-skills.mjs'
scripts.test:smoke: sh -c 'output=$(PI_OFFLINE=1 pi --no-session --no-context-files --list-models __pi_smoke_no_match__ 2>&1); status=$?; printf "%s\n" "$output"; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then exit $status; fi; ! printf "%s\n" "$output" | grep -q "\[Extension issues\]"'
scripts.test:unit: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/context-kit/*.test.ts "$ext"/files/*.test.ts "$ext"/lsp/__tests__/lsp.test.mjs "$ext"/compute-guardrails.test.mjs "$ext"/user-context.test.mjs "$ext"/lifecycle-model-recommender/*.test.ts'
